title: VanillaToys
body:
More features are available in [VanillaToys+](https://modrinth.com/modrinth/vanillatoys+).
Features
  • Zoom
  • Shaders
  • Good performance
  • Connected textures
  • MCPatcher/OptiFine resource pack support
  • 3rd party capes (OptiFine, LabyMod, MinecraftCapes)
Pre-defined settings
  • Volume: 50%
  • Unlimited FPS
  • Zoom hotkey: C
  • Show operator item tab
  • Classic enchantment glint
  • Load/save hotbar hotkey: none
  • Clouds
  • Narrator
  • View bobbing
  • Tutorial toasts
  • Minecraft music
  • Multiplayer warning
